_comment: The cartridge-shelf loop: consoles[2] omits romPath entirely, so its stand starts EMPTY (no machine assembles until a player carries a library cartridge to it and inserts). The library supplies two titled cartridges on the shelf; either can be picked up and inserted into the empty stand, then booted. Run via `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-shelf.json`.

consoles.romPath: D:/Source/ByteTerrace/Silo/ROMS/Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible).gbc
D:/Source/ByteTerrace/Silo/ROMS/Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible).gbc

library.title: Gold (spare cartridge)
library.romPath: D:/Source/ByteTerrace/Silo/ROMS/Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible).gbc

library.title: Gold (loaner cartridge)
library.romPath: D:/Source/ByteTerrace/Silo/ROMS/Pokemon - Gold Version (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible).gbc
